name: Ranch Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1/4 inch strips
1/2 cup corn chips or crushed tortilla chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with chili powder.
2. In a skillet, cook chicken in oil for 6 minutes or until the juices run clear.
3. Place salad greens in a large bowl or on individual plates.
4. Top with cheese and chicken.
5. Combine salad dressing and salsa; drizzle over chicken.
6. Top with chips.
